MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF RICHARD E PRESCOTT. AGENT FOR PLAINTIFF BOBBY NAZAM.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY PAUL ROSS FOR DEFENDANT JOHN CIVIL

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 226 - 6TH STREET, #106. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY WITH A STAY UNTIL 5PM 11/15/05.
MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS PER 1542CC. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. IF JUDGMENT SATISFIED IN FULL, PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:LARRY CURTICE ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; TINA PAXTON (218)
